block_00:
PowerShares: A Nasdaq ETF
that will revolutionize your trading
block_01: IQ Option has recently added a couple of ETF-based assets to the platform. One of those is PowerShares ETF - an asset that tracks the prices of the world’s leading tech companies like Apple, Amazon, Microsoft, Facebook and Google.
block_02: PowerShares ETF is like a portfolio of Big Tech stocks that you can invest in using a single CFDs position. Come on over to the Blog to find out how you can benefit from trading this ETF.
